arts.ttl: Preview: Bayern Munich vs. Wolfsburg - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Bayern Munich and Wolfsburg, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Report: After talks, tension between Bayern Munich and agent for Alphonso Davies
arts.sum: According to a report from Sky Sport journalists Florian Plettenberg and Kerry Hau, things have, indeed, taken a step back between Bayern Munich and Alphonso Davies — with the player’s camp pushing for more money: Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany.

arts.ttl: Hardline Approach: Oliver Kahn feels Bayern Munich should set a Joshua Kimmich deadline
arts.sum: The trio of key Bayern players all have current contracts that are set to expire this summer and can all technically talk to other clubs and even sign pre-contracts now that the first of the month has passed. As Max Eberl recently put it, Bayern Munich is entering “crunch time” for the contract negotiations for Jamal Musiala, Alphonso Davies, and Joshua Kimmich.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany praises “hungry” Bayern Munich after dominant display vs. Hoffenheim
arts.sum: Bayern Munich got after it in Wednesday’s 5-0 Bundesliga win over TSG Hoffenheim — an energetic display that has Bavarian spirits soaring. The win leaves Bayern solidly ahead of defending champions Bayer Leverkusen in this year’s Bundesliga title race and keeps the pressure on Xabi Alonso’s men.

arts.ttl: Sources: Everton have held talks over winger likened to Leroy Sane as Fulham and Newcastle also keen
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm Everton’s stance towards Ernest Nuamah, with the likes of Fulham and Newcastle United also keen. Nuamah has struggled for game...

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich eyeing Sporting CP center-back Ousmane Diomande
arts.sum: Bayern want Sporting center-back Ousmane Diomande (21) and will try to anticipate the move this month. Sporting CP’s Ousmane Diomande seems to be the preferred target of Bayern Munich board member for sport Max Eberl:

arts.ttl: Report: Recent days have Bayern Munich star Alphonso Davies ready to explore his options
arts.sum: Around Christmas, Real Madrid believed that Alphonso Davies was going to extend his contract at Bayern, but things have changed in recent days. According to a report from Relevo journalists Jorge Picon and Rodra Pascual (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ), Alphonso Davies might have been set to extend hss contract with Bayern Munich “around Christmas”, but things have changed.

arts.ttl: Bayern issue transfer update as Chelsea look to swap Christopher Nkunku for Mathys Tel
arts.sum: The two forwards have been linked with swapping places

arts.ttl: Barcelona drop out of race for Bayern Munich star, Real Madrid remain
arts.sum: An update on the Spanish interest in the services of Bayern Munich star Joshua Kimmich has this week been forthcoming online. And it points towards one of La Liga’s two…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich remain interested in Martin Zubimendi due to Kimmich’s contract situation
arts.sum: Bayern Munich have continued their interest in signing Martin Zubimendi from La Liga side Real Sociedad due to Joshua Kimmich’s future remaining unresolved. Kimmich’s contract with Bayern Munich ends in…
